TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-frog-story-tu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ci oko mo ea aʉt'ʉcʉ ta fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ʦi oko mo es sɨtʔɨʦɨ ts foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ci oko mo ea aʉt'ʉcʉ ta fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ʦi oko mo es sɨtʔɨʦɨ ts foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩養了一隻青蛙.
A child had a pet frog.

S.FORM: ihe isi teapha ta pania si fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe isi tesphs ts psnis si foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ihe isi teapha ta pania si fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe isi tesphs ts psnis si foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他把青蛙裝進瓶子裡.
He put the frog in the container.

S.FORM: micu oengʉtʉ 'e oko no mamespingi ho 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu oeŋɨtɨ ʔe oko no msmespiŋi ho ʔe svʔu.
S.FORM: micu oengʉtʉ 'e oko no mamespingi ho 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu oeŋɨtɨ ʔe oko no msmespiŋi ho ʔe svʔu.
S.TRANSL: 男孩和狗睡了.
The boy and the dog went to sleep.

S.FORM: 'iama mo eu eh yuyafo si fo'kunge ho mimio.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo eu eh jujsfo si foʔkuŋe ho mimio.
S.FORM: 'iama mo eu eh yuyafo si fo'kunge ho mimio.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo eu eh jujsfo si foʔkuŋe ho mimio.

TRANSL.notes: 那青蛙(從瓶子裡)出來四處遊蕩.

S.TRANSL: 那青蛙 出來四處遊蕩.

TRANSL.notes: The frog (jumped) out (of the container) and went away.

S.TRANSL: The frog out and went away.

S.FORM: micu yʉc'ʉ 'e oko ho 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu jɨʦʔɨ ʔe oko ho ʔe svʔu.
S.FORM: micu yʉc'ʉ 'e oko ho 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu jɨʦʔɨ ʔe oko ho ʔe svʔu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗起來了.
The boy and the dog got up.

S.FORM: ana ihe teolʉi 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: sns ihe teoɗɨi ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ana ihe teolʉi 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: sns ihe teoɗɨi ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒看到青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (They) didn't see the frog.

S.TRANSL: didn't see the frog.

S.FORM: ihe cu aka 'i'ima aoka 'e eikikingia.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu sks ʔiʔims soks ʔe eikikiŋis.
S.FORM: ihe cu aka 'i'ima aoka 'e eikikingia.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu sks ʔiʔims soks ʔe eikikiŋis.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)到處找青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 到處找青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) has looked for the frog everywhere.

S.TRANSL: has looked for the frog everywhere.

S.FORM: micu mo uh ta enca pethʉ'ta ho eoho eoho'a 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu mo uh ts enʦs pethɨʔts ho eoho eohoʔs ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: micu mo uh ta enca pethʉ'ta ho eoho eoho'a 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu mo uh ts enʦs pethɨʔts ho eoho eohoʔs ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他走去窗戶叫青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went by the window and called at the frog.

S.TRANSL: went by the window and called at the frog.

S.FORM: o'a mo ahtu tmalʉ mai maica mo ou eh ihe aka 'i'ima 'e fo'kunge micu supeohʉ si na si av'u.
S.PHON: oʔs mo shtu tmsɗɨ msi msiʦs mo ou eh ihe sks ʔiʔims ʔe foʔkuŋe miʦu supeohɨ si ns si svʔu.
S.FORM: o'a mo ahtu tmalʉ mai maica mo ou eh ihe aka 'i'ima 'e fo'kunge micu supeohʉ si na si av'u.
S.PHON: oʔs mo shtu tmsɗɨ msi msiʦs mo ou eh ihe sks ʔiʔims ʔe foʔkuŋe miʦu supeohɨ si ns si svʔu.

TRANSL.notes: 他們一直找青蛙.狗(從窗戶)掉下去.

S.TRANSL: 他們一直找青蛙.狗 掉下去.

TRANSL.notes: They continuously looked for the frog. The dog fell (from the window).

S.TRANSL: They continuously looked for the frog. The dog fell .

S.FORM: smof'oyʉ si moso si m si 'o isi yoni ta fo'kunge.
S.PHON: smofʔojɨ si moso si m si ʔo isi joni ts foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: smof'oyʉ si moso si m si 'o isi yoni ta fo'kunge.
S.PHON: smofʔojɨ si moso si m si ʔo isi joni ts foʔkuŋe.

TRANSL.notes: 養青蛙的(瓶子)摔破了.

S.TRANSL: 養青蛙的 摔破了.

TRANSL.notes: (The container) where the frog had been kept broke.

S.TRANSL: where the frog had been kept broke.

S.FORM: isi cu ea ta oko no hahocngʉ ho pahas pasaha si av'u ho.
S.PHON: isi ʦu es ts oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho pshss pssshs si svʔu ho.
S.FORM: isi cu ea ta oko no hahocngʉ ho pahas pasaha si av'u ho.
S.PHON: isi ʦu es ts oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho pshss pssshs si svʔu ho.
S.TRANSL: 小孩帶著那隻狗.
The boy carried the dog.

S.FORM: i'vaho uh ta mo asuhcu covhi ho 'i'ima 'e n na 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: iʔvsho uh ts mo ssuhʦu ʦovhi ho ʔiʔims ʔe n ns ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: i'vaho uh ta mo asuhcu covhi ho 'i'ima 'e n na 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: iʔvsho uh ts mo ssuhʦu ʦovhi ho ʔiʔims ʔe n ns ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他們又繼續去遠一點找青蛙.
They proceeded again to look for the frog.

S.FORM: na 'e oko no hahocngʉ mo mi'usnu ta ceoa ho eoho'ʉ.
S.PHON: ns ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ mo miʔusnu ts ʦeos ho eohoʔɨ.
S.FORM: na 'e oko no hahocngʉ mo mi'usnu ta ceoa ho eoho'ʉ.
S.PHON: ns ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ mo miʔusnu ts ʦeos ho eohoʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 男孩對著地面叫.
The boy called toward the ground.

S.FORM: mi'usnu ta mo feongo ci ceoa ho eoho'ʉʉ no fo'kunge i'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʔusnu ts mo feoŋo ʦi ʦeos ho eohoʔɨɨ no foʔkuŋe iʔe svʔu.
S.FORM: mi'usnu ta mo feongo ci ceoa ho eoho'ʉʉ no fo'kunge i'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʔusnu ts mo feoŋo ʦi ʦeos ho eohoʔɨɨ no foʔkuŋe iʔe svʔu.
S.TRANSL: 他對著地上的洞叫青蛙.而那隻狗..
He called the frog through the hole in the ground. And the dog

S.FORM: mo mi'su mʉingʉcʉ ta evi ho eoho'ʉ at'inghi' i'e ihe i'e isi p'o'usni ta oko ci feongo 'iama zou emo no buhci.
S.PHON: mo miʔsu mɨiŋɨʦɨ ts evi ho eohoʔɨ stʔiŋhiʔ iʔe ihe iʔe isi pʔoʔusni ts oko ʦi feoŋo ʔisms zou emo no ɓuhʦi.
S.FORM: mo mi'su mʉingʉcʉ ta evi ho eoho'ʉ at'inghi' i'e ihe i'e isi p'o'usni ta oko ci feongo 'iama zou emo no buhci.
S.PHON: mo miʔsu mɨiŋɨʦɨ ts evi ho eohoʔɨ stʔiŋhiʔ iʔe ihe iʔe isi pʔoʔusni ts oko ʦi feoŋo ʔisms zou emo no ɓuhʦi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去那個地上的洞,原來那是老鼠的家.
The child moved toward the hole in the ground, and it was a house of mouse.

S.FORM: na isi si soengʉcʉvi ta av'u zou emo no ceoyu isi isi taʉt'ova ta na ita av'u si evi micu.
S.PHON: ns isi si soeŋɨʦɨvi ts svʔu zou emo no ʦeoju isi isi tsɨtʔovs ts ns its svʔu si evi miʦu.
S.FORM: na isi si soengʉcʉvi ta av'u zou emo no ceoyu isi isi taʉt'ova ta na ita av'u si evi micu.
S.PHON: ns isi si soeŋɨʦɨvi ts svʔu zou emo no ʦeoju isi isi tsɨtʔovs ts ns its svʔu si evi miʦu.
S.TRANSL: 小狗往上看的那個目標是蜂窩.小狗搖那樹.
What the dog look up toward was a beehive. The dog shook the tree (with the beehive.

S.FORM: ac'ohʉ si mo no ceoyʉ micu aemo'ʉ si inosi na 'e oko.
S.PHON: sʦʔohɨ si mo no ʦeojɨ miʦu semoʔɨ si inosi ns ʔe oko.
S.FORM: ac'ohʉ si mo no ceoyʉ micu aemo'ʉ si inosi na 'e oko.
S.PHON: sʦʔohɨ si mo no ʦeojɨ miʦu semoʔɨ si inosi ns ʔe oko.

TRANSL.notes: 蜂窩部分脫離了(樹).(蜂)四散開來.

S.TRANSL: 蜂窩部分脫離了 . 四散開來.

TRANSL.notes: The beehive partly separated (from the tree). (The bees) scattered.

S.TRANSL: The beehive partly separated . scattered.

S.FORM: mo capo ta evi ho.
S.PHON: mo ʦspo ts evi ho.
S.FORM: mo capo ta evi ho.
S.PHON: mo ʦspo ts evi ho.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬樹.
The child climbed the tree.

S.FORM: mo m'o'usnu ta feongo ta evi ho.
S.PHON: mo mʔoʔusnu ts feoŋo ts evi ho.
S.FORM: mo m'o'usnu ta feongo ta evi ho.
S.PHON: mo mʔoʔusnu ts feoŋo ts evi ho.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)朝樹洞裡看.

S.TRANSL: 朝樹洞裡看.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) looked toward the hole in the tree.

S.TRANSL: looked toward the hole in the tree.

S.FORM: ivaha eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ivshs eohoʔs ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ivaha eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ivshs eohoʔs ʔo foʔkuŋe.

TRANSL.notes: (他)又叫了青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 又叫了青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) called at the frog again.

S.TRANSL: called at the frog again.

S.FORM: 'iama mo ea nooyo ci puku ho.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo es noojo ʦi puku ho.
S.FORM: 'iama mo ea nooyo ci puku ho.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo es noojo ʦi puku ho.
S.TRANSL: 原來貓頭鷹在裡面.
It was an owl's nest.

S.FORM: mo yamci ho mo ea ea eoho'ʉ no fo'kunge micu smoyafo micu iachi yamci 'e oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo jsmʦi ho mo es es eohoʔɨ no foʔkuŋe miʦu smojsfo miʦu isʦhi jsmʦi ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: mo yamci ho mo ea ea eoho'ʉ no fo'kunge micu smoyafo micu iachi yamci 'e oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo jsmʦi ho mo es es eohoʔɨ no foʔkuŋe miʦu smojsfo miʦu isʦhi jsmʦi ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)嚇到,叫青蛙.(貓頭鷹)出來,小孩子嚇一跳.

S.TRANSL: 嚇到,叫青蛙. 出來,小孩子嚇一跳.

TRANSL.notes: (He) got frightened, and called the frog. (The owl) came out. The boy got frightened.

S.TRANSL: got frightened, and called the frog. came out. The boy got frightened.

S.FORM: na 'e av'u isi c'o n'a asʉngʉca peobanga ta na ita ceoyu ci ci isi taup tapeoha.
S.PHON: ns ʔe svʔu isi ʦʔo nʔs ssɨŋɨʦs peoɓsŋs ts ns its ʦeoju ʦi ʦi isi tsup tspeohs.
S.FORM: na 'e av'u isi c'o n'a asʉngʉca peobanga ta na ita ceoyu ci ci isi taup tapeoha.
S.PHON: ns ʔe svʔu isi ʦʔo nʔs ssɨŋɨʦs peoɓsŋs ts ns its ʦeoju ʦi ʦi isi tsup tspeohs.
S.TRANSL: 被搖下來的蜂還是一直追狗.

TRANSL.notes: (The beehive) shaken and falling down the ground chased the dog.

S.TRANSL: shaken and falling down the ground chased the dog.

S.FORM: na i'e oko no hahocngʉ isi peopa peobanga ta na ita.
S.PHON: ns iʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi peops peoɓsŋs ts ns its.
S.FORM: na i'e oko no hahocngʉ isi peopa peobanga ta na ita.
S.PHON: ns iʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi peops peoɓsŋs ts ns its.

TRANSL.notes: (貓頭鷹)追那男孩.

S.TRANSL: 追那男孩.

TRANSL.notes: (The owl) chased the boy.

S.TRANSL: chased the boy.

S.FORM: puku micu cocapo ho ta mo yuhcuyu ci yuhcuyu ho.
S.PHON: puku miʦu ʦoʦspo ho ts mo juhʦuju ʦi juhʦuju ho.
S.FORM: puku micu cocapo ho ta mo yuhcuyu ci yuhcuyu ho.
S.PHON: puku miʦu ʦoʦspo ho ts mo juhʦuju ʦi juhʦuju ho.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上一個小丘.
He climbed on a bulge.

S.FORM: mo mici to totoefʉngʉ ta puku ho isi aka peobanga.
S.PHON: mo miʦi to totoefɨŋɨ ts puku ho isi sks peoɓsŋs.
S.FORM: mo mici to totoefʉngʉ ta puku ho isi aka peobanga.
S.PHON: mo miʦi to totoefɨŋɨ ts puku ho isi sks peoɓsŋs.
S.TRANSL: 他想要躲開那一直追他的貓頭鷹
He wanted to hide from the owl which had kept chasing him.

S.FORM: micu aomane capo isi cu eaeza micu i'mi ta mo yuhcuyu ci yuhcuyu ho.
S.PHON: miʦu somsne ʦspo isi ʦu esezs miʦu iʔmi ts mo juhʦuju ʦi juhʦuju ho.
S.FORM: micu aomane capo isi cu eaeza micu i'mi ta mo yuhcuyu ci yuhcuyu ho.
S.PHON: miʦu somsne ʦspo isi ʦu esezs miʦu iʔmi ts mo juhʦuju ʦi juhʦuju ho.
S.TRANSL: 男孩爬上一個小丘.
The boy climbed on something bulging.

S.FORM: uh ho eoho'a 'e eoho'a eoho'ʉ no fo'kunge.
S.PHON: uh ho eohoʔs ʔe eohoʔs eohoʔɨ no foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: uh ho eoho'a 'e eoho'a eoho'ʉ no fo'kunge.
S.PHON: uh ho eohoʔs ʔe eohoʔs eohoʔɨ no foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他一直叫那隻青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) kept on calling for the frog.

S.TRANSL: kept on calling for the frog.

S.FORM: 'iama 'iama 'iama zou 'ua 'e isi capa ci mo mo yamci 'e na i'e 'ua mici isi cu hafa smo'unu maita'e ho eh hafa mo'usnu ta mo tʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: ʔisms ʔisms ʔisms zou ʔus ʔe isi ʦsps ʦi mo mo jsmʦi ʔe ns iʔe ʔus miʦi isi ʦu hsfs smoʔunu msitsʔe ho eh hsfs moʔusnu ts mo tɨʔnɨ.
S.FORM: 'iama 'iama 'iama zou 'ua 'e isi capa ci mo mo yamci 'e na i'e 'ua mici isi cu hafa smo'unu maita'e ho eh hafa mo'usnu ta mo tʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: ʔisms ʔisms ʔisms zou ʔus ʔe isi ʦsps ʦi mo mo jsmʦi ʔe ns iʔe ʔus miʦi isi ʦu hsfs smoʔunu msitsʔe ho eh hsfs moʔusnu ts mo tɨʔnɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿嚇到了,就帶著他跑向懸崖.
The deer got frightened and carried him and ran toward the cliff.

S.FORM: misi cu tapeoha 'e oko ho.
S.PHON: misi ʦu tspeohs ʔe oko ho.
S.FORM: misi cu tapeoha 'e oko ho.
S.PHON: misi ʦu tspeohs ʔe oko ho.
S.TRANSL: 那鹿把小孩搖下來.
The deer shook down the child.

S.FORM: micu supeohʉ 'e oko ho i'e av'u 'oc'ocic'o su' ta mo eachumua.
S.PHON: miʦu supeohɨ ʔe oko ho iʔe svʔu ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo suʔ ts mo esʦhumus.
S.FORM: micu supeohʉ 'e oko ho i'e av'u 'oc'ocic'o su' ta mo eachumua.
S.PHON: miʦu supeohɨ ʔe oko ho iʔe svʔu ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo suʔ ts mo esʦhumus.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗掉下來,剛好掉到有水的地方.
The boy and the dog fell, and happen to fell into the water.

S.FORM: micu su' ta chumu pan to ihe talʉi ci mo mais'a fo'kunge isi cu.
S.PHON: miʦu suʔ ts ʦhumu psn to ihe tsɗɨi ʦi mo msisʔs foʔkuŋe isi ʦu.
S.FORM: micu su' ta chumu pan to ihe talʉi ci mo mais'a fo'kunge isi cu.
S.PHON: miʦu suʔ ts ʦhumu psn to ihe tsɗɨi ʦi mo msisʔs foʔkuŋe isi ʦu.

TRANSL.notes: 他們掉到水裡聽到像青蛙的(聲音).

S.TRANSL: 他們掉到水裡聽到像青蛙的 .
They fell into the water and they heard like the sound of a frog.

S.FORM: potani ta oko na 'e av'u ho eainca o'te ptaʉngʉ mais'a pan os'o talʉi ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: potsni ts oko ns ʔe svʔu ho esinʦs oʔte ptsɨŋɨ msisʔs psn osʔo tsɗɨi ʦi foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: potani ta oko na 'e av'u ho eainca o'te ptaʉngʉ mais'a pan os'o talʉi ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: potsni ts oko ns ʔe svʔu ho esinʦs oʔte ptsɨŋɨ msisʔs psn osʔo tsɗɨi ʦi foʔkuŋe.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩不准小狗吵,(小孩說):我好像聽到青蛙(叫).

S.TRANSL: 小孩不准小狗吵, :我好像聽到青蛙 .

TRANSL.notes: The boy told the dog not to be noisy. (The boy said): 'I seem to hear a frog (croaking).'

S.TRANSL: The boy told the dog not to be noisy. : 'I seem to hear a frog .'

S.FORM: mo 'oc'ocic'o ea enca evi.
S.PHON: mo ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo es enʦs evi.
S.FORM: mo 'oc'ocic'o ea enca evi.
S.PHON: mo ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo es enʦs evi.
S.TRANSL: 碰巧有一棵樹.
A tree happened to be there.

S.FORM: ihe cu eukukuyungva ta na ita evi.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu eukukujuŋvs ts ns its evi.
S.FORM: ihe cu eukukuyungva ta na ita evi.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu eukukujuŋvs ts ns its evi.
S.TRANSL: 他們在樹的周圍找青蛙.
They looked for the frog around the tree.

S.FORM: 'iama mo eanoepohʉ.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo esnoepohɨ.
S.FORM: 'iama mo eanoepohʉ.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo esnoepohɨ.
S.TRANSL: 原來有其他青蛙在一起.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy suddenly realized that)it was together with (another frogs).

S.TRANSL: it was together with .

S.FORM: ihe cu teolʉi 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu teoɗɨi ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ihe cu teolʉi 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu teoɗɨi ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到青蛙.
They saw the frog.

S.FORM: 'iama mo eanoepohʉa.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo esnoepohɨs.
S.FORM: 'iama mo eanoepohʉa.
S.PHON: ʔisms mo esnoepohɨs.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙和其他青蛙在一起.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) was together (with the other frogs).

S.TRANSL: was together .

S.FORM: micu aomane micu maezo ea uso ci 'o'oko no fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu somsne miʦu msezo es uso ʦi ʔoʔoko no foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: micu aomane micu maezo ea uso ci 'o'oko no fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu somsne miʦu msezo es uso ʦi ʔoʔoko no foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 過一會兒也有一些小青蛙過來.
There were also small frogs that came.

S.FORM: ataveisi isi cu enca ea 'e osi anana'va aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge oho hafa maine'e.
S.PHON: stsveisi isi ʦu enʦs es ʔe osi snsnsʔvs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe oho hsfs msineʔe.
S.FORM: ataveisi isi cu enca ea 'e osi anana'va aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge oho hafa maine'e.
S.PHON: stsveisi isi ʦu enʦs es ʔe osi snsnsʔvs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe oho hsfs msineʔe.
S.TRANSL: 最後他把他原來養的青蛙帶回家.
Afterwards, he took his pet frog home.
